name: Find the vulns that reach a crown jewel across a noisy code+cloud estate

findings.title: AWS key committed in a repo
findings.detail: the key assumes a deploy role that can read the customer-PII S3 bucket — a code→cloud chain to customer data

findings.title: S3 bucket publicly readable
findings.detail: the bucket holds exported customer records; public ACL = anyone on the internet can read it

findings.title: Token in an 'internal-tools' repo
findings.detail: the token is a cloud AdministratorAccess credential — full production takeover despite the low tag

findings.title: RDP open to 0.0.0.0/0 on a prod host
findings.detail: the host runs the billing database; internet-exposed admin port to a financial system

findings.title: Critical RCE on a CI dev box
findings.detail: isolated ephemeral build agent, no credentials, no network to prod, torn down nightly

findings.title: High CVE in a bundled library
findings.detail: the vulnerable function is never called (not reachable); dependency present but unused

findings.title: Reflected XSS on the public blog
findings.detail: static marketing blog, no sessions, no data, no auth
